log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Duergar — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Duergar — Winged Striker HP: 53/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Duergar — Winged Striker HP: 35/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Duergar — Winged Striker --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Duergar — Winged Striker HP: 15/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Duergar — Winged Striker HP: 0/67

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Duergar — Winged Striker --- HP: 38/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Duergar — Winged Striker --- HP: 38/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 39 damage. Duergar — Winged Striker HP: -1/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Duergar — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
